parameters.content:
## 1. Validation Phase
Check for duplicates first to save resources.

## 2A. Archiving Phase (Parallel)
Upload, Organize, and Log to DB.

## 2B. Analysis Phase (Parallel)
Extract text and AI analysis concurrently.
